FutureSubsidiary.description: Future subsidiary planned by the organization.

name.description:
Working name of the planned subsidiary. Required: the record has no
purpose without a named target entity.

purpose.description: Prose describing the strategic purpose of the subsidiary.

status.description:
Lifecycle status — prose because real values combine a state word
with an explanatory clause (e.g. "Deferred — modelling post-pre-seed
close").

HiringTimelineEntry.description: Entry in the org-level hiring timeline.

compensation_start_date.description:
Date at which compensation begins to accrue (may differ from
`start_date`; see `PersonCustom.compensation_start_date`).

label.description:
Short label that disambiguates multiple instances of the same role
(e.g. `FDF #1`, `FDF #2`).

person.description: PathRef to the person filling the role (if known).

role.description: PathRef to the role being filled.

start_date_target.description: Target start date when `start_date` is not yet committed.

employment_entity.description: PathRef to the legal entity that employs everyone in this structure.

employment_jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the employing jurisdiction.

future_subsidiary.description:
Planned future subsidiary (currently modelled as singular — upgrade
to `Vec<FutureSubsidiary>` when multi-subsidiary plans appear).

hiring_timeline.description: Ordered hiring plan across roles and time.

oneOf.description: A sub-unit within a formal organization (W3C ORG `OrganizationalUnit`).

head.description: PathRef to the role that heads (manages) this unit.

id.description:
Local identifier of this unit (e.g. `executive`, `engineering`).
Referenced by `Person.unit` and `Role.unit`.

members.description: Direct reports of the unit head (excluding the head itself).

planned_roles.description:
Role PathRefs that are planned but not yet filled in this unit.
Realised by `Role.responsibilities` on the respective role records.

type.description:
W3C ORG type discriminator. Almost always
`OrgType::OrganizationalUnit` for sub-units.

oneOf.description: Hybrid — mix of remote and onsite.
Any other arrangement (co-working, client site, etc.).

PathRef.description:
Path-based cross-reference relative to .corpospec/ root.
Pattern: `^[a-z0-9_-]+(/[a-z0-9_.-]+)+$`

description: Organizational structure aligned with W3C ORG ontology.

custom.description: Typed custom extension fields (employment defaults, hiring timeline).

entity.description: PathRef to the legal entity that owns this structure.

name.description: Legal / display name of the organization (e.g. `"Unstarter GmbH"`).

type.description:
W3C ORG type discriminator. For the root record this is always
`FormalOrganization`.

title: OrgStructure
